messages.content:
edit: 
When we were in Germany, she had no problem communicating with people and was able to learn some German
When we were in Germany, she had no difficulty conversing with people and managed to pick up some German language skills.

revise: 
When we were in Germany, he had no problem communicating with people and was able to learn some German. But we took some distance and now he forgot German to some extent, but I'm sure he will be able to learn quickly when we come back.

When we were in Germany, he had no issues communicating with people and was able to acquire some proficiency in German. However, since we have been apart for a while, he has partially forgotten the language. Nevertheless, I am confident that he will be able to quickly relearn it when we return.
revise again

During our time in Germany, he effortlessly communicated with people and successfully learned some German. However, due to our recent separation, he has experienced a slight lapse in his language skills. Nonetheless, I have full confidence that he will swiftly regain his fluency once we return.
revise: due to our recent separation from Germany

Due to our recent departure from Germany, he has experienced a slight decline in his communication abilities in German. However, I have no doubt that once we are back in a German-speaking environment, he will quickly reacquire his language skills.

revise: 
Due to our recent distance from Germany

Due to our recent geographical separation from Germany, he has noticed a slight decline in his proficiency in German. However, I am confident that once we are back in close proximity to the language, he will swiftly regain his language skills.

revise: 
When we applied for the visa last year, German language skills were not required. Also, German language skills were not requested when we extended our visa in Hagen

When we applied for the visa last year, there was no requirement for German language skills. Additionally, when we extended our visa in Hagen, there was no request for proficiency in the German language.
revise: for this reason

For this reason, we did not have to demonstrate any German language skills when applying for the visa last year. Furthermore, when we went through the process of extending our visa in Hagen, there was no requirement for German language proficiency.
synonm for that's why

Hence, we did not have to demonstrate any German language skills when applying for the visa last year. Furthermore, when we went through the process of extending our visa in Hagen, there was no requirement for German language proficiency.
revise : We already did fingerprinting
We have already undergone the process of fingerprinting.

revise: 
The letter was issued to two different addresses
The letter was issued to two separate addresses.
